queries.question: What was the alias of the lead for "Siamese Dream"?
queries.sql: SELECT a.alias FROM Artists a JOIN MusicAlbums m ON a.id = m.artistId WHERE m.albumTitle = 'Siamese Dream';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?alias WHERE {
  ?a a :Artist .
  ?m a :MusicAlbums .
  ?m p:hasArtists ?a .
  OPTIONAL { ?a p:alias ?alias . }
  ?m p:albumTitle ?albumtitle_f .
  FILTER(STR(?albumtitle_f) = "Siamese Dream")
}

queries.question: Provide the names of artists who did not release any music before 1995.
queries.sql: SELECT realName FROM Artists WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT artistId FROM MusicAlbums WHERE releaseYear < 1995);

queries.question: Provide the names of artists who did not release any music before 1995.
queries.sql: SELECT alias FROM Artists WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT artistId FROM MusicAlbums WHERE releaseYear < 1995);

queries.question: Provide the names of artists who did not release any music before 1995.
queries.sql: SELECT realName, alias FROM Artists WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT artistId FROM MusicAlbums WHERE releaseYear < 1995);

queries.question: Who was the lead for "Siamese Dream"?
queries.sql: SELECT a.realName FROM Artists a JOIN MusicAlbums m ON a.id = m.artistId WHERE m.albumTitle = 'Siamese Dream';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?realname WHERE {
  ?a a :Artist .
  ?m a :MusicAlbums .
  ?m p:hasArtists ?a .
  ?a p:realName ?realname .
  ?m p:albumTitle ?albumtitle_f .
  FILTER(STR(?albumtitle_f) = "Siamese Dream")
}

queries.question: Who was the lead for "Siamese Dream"?
queries.sql: SELECT a.realName, alias FROM Artists a JOIN MusicAlbums m ON a.id = m.artistId WHERE m.albumTitle = 'Siamese Dream';

ambiguous_dsl.question: Who was the lead for "Siamese Dream"?
Provide the names of artists who did not release any music before 1995.
